title: Senior Software Engineer - iGate India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - iGate India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at iGate India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Hyderabad-based team.

About iGate India:
iGate India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with iGate India!
